who: logistics managers processing 5–15 fuel expense reports/month
offer: For logistics managers processing 5–15 fuel expense reports/month, inaccurate fuel tracking causes budget overruns. We automate fuel tracking instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate fuel tracking leads to budget overruns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers

Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
